characters.name: Rocky
characters.tagline: THE WILD, WOO-WOOING SPIRIT OF SCOUTPAW
characters.bio: Rocky, our 'Howl-of-Fame' singer, is an adventurous leader. His voice and playful energy turn every day into an epic journey.
characters.quote: He believes every song deserves a howl-along and every living room is just an indoor mountain waiting to be climbed.

characters.name: Max
characters.tagline: THE SOULFUL, GOLDEN HEART OF SCOUTPAW
characters.bio: Max, our 'Welcome Wag-on,' is the heart of the crew. This snuggle master loves head-tilting to music and carrying his plushie, filling our home with love. He's our ScoutPaw Captain!
characters.quote: He believes every nap is a musical masterpiece and every stranger is just a best friend who hasn't shared a golden snack yet.

characters.name: Oscar
characters.tagline: THE BRILLIANT, BEAMING MIND OF SCOUTPAW
characters.bio: Oscar, the 'Professor of Play,' keeps your dog mentally sharp and relaxed with music. He's the smartest pup around!
characters.quote: He believes every day needs a job to do - and his favorite job is being the best study buddy your dog ever had.

characters.name: Buddy
characters.tagline: THE SPUNKY, LOW-RIDING SPARK OF SCOUTPAW
characters.bio: Buddy: big personality, short legs! This 'Professional Splooter' uses satellite ears to catch every beat. Fluffy trousers & pack leader, he proves you don't need height to liven up the party.
characters.quote: He believes no snack is too high to reach and every song is an excuse for a full-body wiggle.

characters.name: Bella
characters.tagline: THE ELEGANT, ENCHANTING STAR OF SCOUTPAW
characters.bio: Bella, the crew's graceful 'Prima Ballerina,' uses her sharp mind to dance beautifully through musical stories, turning living rooms into peaceful stages.
characters.quote: She believes every calming melody is a dance and every dream is better when it's high-fashion.
